case_title: CHASE BANK USA, N.A. VS. ARIELLE R MCKEE

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION HALLIE N. ZIMMERMAN FILED RE: INTEREST FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA, N.A.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA, N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCKEE, ARIELLE R $6,660.81 PRINCIPAL, $229.93 INTEREST, $264.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,155.24, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT MCKEE, ARIELLE R HEARING SET FOR NOV-24-2010 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON NOV-24-2010 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT ARIELLE MCKEE'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIES THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
FEES NOT PAID. FILING OF ANSWER BY DEFENDANT ARIELLE R MCKEE IS STRICKEN. NOTICE SENT TO PARTIES. (206)
